compute.description: The compute resource associated with the resource.

recipe.description: The recipe data at the time of deployment

resourceId.description: The resource id of the compute resource for application environment.

identity.description: Configuration for supported external identity providers

oidcIssuer.description: The URI for your compute platform's OIDC issuer

resource.description: The resource ID of the provisioned identity

managedIdentity.description: The list of user assigned managed identities

namespace.description: The namespace to use for the environment.

kind.description: The Azure container instance compute kind

resourceGroup.description: The resource group to use for the environment.

templateKind.description: TemplateKind is the kind of the recipe template used by the portable resource upon deployment.

templatePath.description: TemplatePath is the path of the recipe consumed by the portable resource upon deployment.

templateVersion.description: TemplateVersion is the version number of the template.

localId.description: The logical identifier scoped to the owning Radius resource. This is only needed or used when a resource has a dependency relationship. LocalIDs do not have any particular format or meaning beyond being compared to determine dependency relationships.

id.description: The UCP resource ID of the underlying resource.

radiusManaged.description: Determines whether Radius manages the lifecycle of the underlying resource.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

environment.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the environment that the application is linked to

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

environment.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the environment that the application is linked to

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

resources.description: The resources in the application graph.

icons.description: Map from iconHash to the verbatim SVG UTF-8 bytes for every icon referenced by any resource in this response. Populated only when the request specifies `includeIcons: true`.

outputResources.description: The resources that comprise this resource.

connections.description: The connections between resources in the application graph.

diffHash.description: Stable hash over the authorable properties of this resource and its sorted dependsOn list. Used by tooling to classify resources as added, removed, modified, or unchanged across graphs. Format: 'sha256:{hex}'.

iconHash.description: SHA-256 hex of the resource type's icon SVG, matching `iconHash` on the resource-type registry. Null when the type has no icon registered. The bytes themselves are delivered inline via `ApplicationGraphResponse.icons` when the request specifies `includeIcons: true`; otherwise clients fetch bytes by hash from the resource-type icon endpoint.

properties.description: Resource-type-specific properties of the resource as returned by its resource provider. The shape of this map varies by `type` (e.g. a `Radius.Compute/containers` resource exposes different keys than `Radius.Datastores/redisCaches` or any user-defined resource type) and matches the `properties` returned by that resource's GET response. Top-level keys already surfaced as first-class fields on this model (`provisioningState`, `connections`) are omitted. The whole `status` object is also omitted because it may contain computed values that include sensitive data (for example, connection strings); the redundant `status.outputResources` list is surfaced via the dedicated `outputResources` field instead. Use `diffHash` rather than a byte-wise compare of this map to detect change.

portalUrl.description: A deep link to the underlying resource in its cloud provider's portal (for example, the Azure portal). Empty when no link is available for the resource.

direction.description: The direction of the connection. 'Outbound' indicates this connection specifies the ID of the destination and 'Inbound' indicates indicates this connection specifies the ID of the source.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the origin of this edge. 'Connection' edges are author-declared entries under properties.connections. 'Dependency' edges are implicit dependencies derived from Bicep's dependsOn list (static graph only in Phase 1). Every emitted edge carries a kind.

parameters.name: includeIcons
parameters.description: When true, `ApplicationGraphResponse.icons` is populated with the SVG bytes for every distinct `iconHash` referenced by the response's resources. When false or omitted, only per-resource `iconHash` values are returned.

parameters.name: dependsOnEdges
parameters.description: Optional caller-supplied dependency edges, grouped by source resource ID. Each entry maps a source Radius resource ID to the list of outbound Kind: Dependency edges leaving that source. Every entry MUST have direction: Outbound and kind: Dependency; entries that don't are ignored. The server merges these onto the connection-only graph it computes from stored resources: excluded types are dropped, unknown endpoints are dropped, and any pair already present as Kind: Connection wins over the caller-supplied Dependency. Typically populated by `rad app graph -a <name> <app.bicep>` after compiling the Bicep template locally.

authenticationMethod.description: The authentication method to use. Supported values: BasicAuth, AzureWI, AwsIrsa.

basicAuthSecretId.description: The ID of a secret resource containing username and password for BasicAuth. Supported types: Radius.Security/secrets (recommended) or Applications.Core/secretStores. Required when authenticationMethod is 'BasicAuth'.

azureWiClientId.description: Azure Workload Identity client ID. Required when authenticationMethod is 'AzureWI'.

azureWiTenantId.description: Azure Workload Identity tenant ID. Required when authenticationMethod is 'AzureWI'.

awsIamRoleArn.description: AWS IAM Role ARN for IRSA authentication. Required when authenticationMethod is 'AwsIrsa'.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

referencedBy.description: Environments that reference this Bicep configuration.

registryAuthentications.description: Authentication configuration for private Bicep registries, keyed by registry hostname (e.g. 'corp.acr.io'). The Bicep driver looks up credentials by the host parsed from the recipe template path.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

referencedBy.description: Environments that reference this Bicep configuration.

registryAuthentications.description: Authentication configuration for private Bicep registries, keyed by registry hostname (e.g. 'corp.acr.io'). The Bicep driver looks up credentials by the host parsed from the recipe template path.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

subscriptionId.description: Azure subscription ID hosting deployed resources.

resourceGroupName.description: Azure resource group hosting deployed resources.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace to deploy workloads into.

accountId.description: AWS account ID for AWS resources to be deployed into.

region.description: AWS region for AWS resources to be deployed into.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

recipePacks.description: List of Recipe Pack resource IDs linked to this environment.

recipeParameters.description: Recipe specific parameters that apply to all resources of a given type in this environment.

providers.description: Cloud provider configuration for the environment.

terraformSettings.description: Resource ID of a Radius.Core/terraformSettings resource providing Terraform recipe settings.

bicepSettings.description: Resource ID of a Radius.Core/bicepSettings resource providing Bicep recipe settings.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

recipePacks.description: List of Recipe Pack resource IDs linked to this environment.

recipeParameters.description: Recipe specific parameters that apply to all resources of a given type in this environment.

providers.description: Cloud provider configuration for the environment.

terraformSettings.description: Resource ID of a Radius.Core/terraformSettings resource providing Terraform recipe settings.

bicepSettings.description: Resource ID of a Radius.Core/bicepSettings resource providing Bicep recipe settings.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

kind.description: The type of recipe (e.g., Terraform, Bicep)

plainHttp.description: Connect to the source using HTTP (not HTTPS). This should be used when the source is known not to support HTTPS, for example in a locally hosted registry for Bicep recipes. Defaults to false (use HTTPS/TLS)

source.description: The source of the recipe. For Bicep recipes this is the OCI registry reference. For Terraform recipes this is the module source.

parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the recipe

outputs.description: Maps the module's outputs onto the resource type's properties, for recipes that point directly at a Bicep or Terraform module. Each entry's value is either a string (the module output name for a non-secret property) or, under the reserved `secrets` key, a nested object mapping secret property names to module output names. A `secrets` entry always routes its module output to the resource's secret outputs regardless of how the module classified it (for example an AVM module's `primaryConnectionString`). Example: `{ host: 'name', secrets: { connectionString: 'primaryConnectionString' } }`.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation

referencedBy.description: List of environment IDs that reference this recipe pack

recipes.description: Map of resource types to their recipe configurations

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation

referencedBy.description: List of environment IDs that reference this recipe pack

recipes.description: Map of resource types to their recipe configurations

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

providerInstallation.description: Provider installation configuration. Specifies the location of providers via network mirrors or direct downloads.

credentials.description: Credentials for authenticating to private Terraform registries (HTTP-based, e.g. app.terraform.io). Map of registry hostname to credential configuration. Rendered as native `credentials "hostname" {}` blocks in the generated .terraformrc. Note: this is for Terraform CLI registry auth (HTTP), not for Git-based module sources; Git auth is a separate mechanism.

networkMirror.description: Network mirror configuration for downloading providers.

url.description: The URL of the provider mirror.

include.description: Provider address patterns to include from this mirror.

exclude.description: Provider address patterns to exclude from this mirror.

include.description: Provider address patterns to include for direct installation.

exclude.description: Provider address patterns to exclude from direct installation.

secret.description: The ID of a secret resource containing the authentication token. Supported types: Radius.Security/secrets (recommended) or Applications.Core/secretStores. The secret must have a key named 'token'.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

referencedBy.description: Environments that reference this Terraform configuration.

terraformrc.description: Terraform CLI configuration file settings. Maps directly to the Terraform CLI configuration file (.terraformrc).

env.description: Environment variables injected during Terraform recipe execution.
